This project is a Go CLI tool that retrieves an access token from an OIDC (OpenID Connect) provider. It uses the coreos/go-oidc library for OIDC protocol management and a YAML configuration file for access parameters.

## Documentation

When you do a modification, update the documentation in the `documentations/README.md` file. The documentation should include:
- Overview of the project
- Main features
- Project structure
- Example configuration
- Main dependencies
